vulnerability.title: Verify Permissions on /var/log Directory
vulnerability.description: To properly set the permissions of /var/log, run the command: $ sudo chmod 0755 /var/log
vulnerability.recommendation: Remediation script: find -H /var/log/ -maxdepth 0 -perm /u+s,g+ws,o+wt -type d -exec chmod u-s,g-ws,o-wt {} \;

triage_decision.reason: Setting /var/log to 0755 is a standard STIG hardening step that does not affect authentication, networking, or critical services, and is unlikely to cause lockout or system breakage.
triage_decision.estimated_impact: filesystems affected; If permissions are too permissive, unauthorized users could read log files, potentially exposing sensitive information.
